_doc: medica shared core (additive base; no removals).

provenance.source: M Health Fairview CGC, Letter of Support Checklists (last updated 2026-03-09)
provenance.policy: Medica Gender Affirmation Procedures (also MCG criteria)
provenance.caveat: General requirements that may change; verify against the member's specific plan. Items absent from the letter may be satisfied elsewhere (clinical notes, DA) -- do not auto-fail; route to human review.

requirements.label: Identifies co-existing concerns, distinguishes from gender dysphoria
Social transition in place or judged unnecessary
